import React,{useRef,useMemo}from'react';import{useFrame}from'@react-three/fiber';import*as THREE from'three';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function GalaxyBackground(){const pointsRef=useRef();const{positions,colors}=useMemo(()=>{const count=6000;const positions=new Float32Array(count*3);const colors=new Float32Array(count*3);for(let i=0;i<count;i++){// Sphere distribution
